allow: PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $ownerPid = $conn.OwningProcess; Get-Process -Id $ownerPid -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, MainWindowTitle } else { Write-Output "Port 5000 is free" })

PowerShell($env:SKIP_AUTH = "true"; $headers = @{"Content-Type" = "application/json"}; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/health" -Method GET -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "Health check: OK - $\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { Write-Output "Health endpoint not found, checking if server responds..."; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Status: $\($r2.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Server response: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($pid5000 = \(netstat -ano | Select-String ":5000 " | Select-String "LISTENING" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "\\s+"\)[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1\); if \($pid5000\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid5000 -Force; "Stopped PID $pid5000" } else { "No process on 5000" })

PowerShell($pid5000 = \(netstat -ano | Select-String ":5000 " | Select-String "LISTENING" | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split "\\s+"\)[-1] } | Select-Object -First 1\); if \($pid5000\) { Stop-Process -Id $pid5000 -Force; "Stopped $pid5000" } else { "Not running" })

PowerShell($port = 5000; $conn = New-Object System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient; try { $conn.Connect\("127.0.0.1", $port\); "Port $port is in use" } catch { "Port $port is free" } finally { $conn.Close\(\) })

PowerShell($body = '{"user_id":"manager1","password":"manager123"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; $r.Content } catch { $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\) | % { $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($_\); $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) } })

PowerShell($body = '{"user_id":"manager1","password":"manager123"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "ERR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)"; try { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) } catch {} })

PowerShell($body = '{"user_id":"manager1","password":"manager123"}'; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5000/api/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $r.Content } catch { $stream = $_.Exception.Response.GetResponseStream\(\); $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); Write-Host "ERROR: $\($sr.ReadToEnd\(\)\)" })
